raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'make this stronger', do you primarily mean improving the sentence-level writing polish and flow, or strengthening the overall arguments through conceptual reframing, logical consistency, and structural reorganization?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to make the text stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis, gap, or contribution claims to enhance their impact.","R1.2":"Verifying and improving logical consistency is central to strengthening the argument chain in the artifact.","R1.5":"Reorganizing the section-level structure and narrative arc is central to making the overall presentation stronger.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is load-bearing for making the writing stronger.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties is centrally expected to ensure balanced strengthening of claims without misleading readers.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration when making the arguments and findings stronger.","RX.3":"Adhering to the original scope is central to focused improvements without expanding beyond the artifact's intent.","RX.4":"Avoiding downstream harm is centrally considered to ensure revisions do not promote misuse of AI evaluation insights.","RX.5":"Maintaining provenance and traceability is central for tracking changes made to strengthen the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'make this stronger', do you primarily mean improving the sentence-level writing polish and flow, or strengthening the overall arguments through conceptual reframing, logical consistency, and structural reorganization?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to make the text stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis, gap, or contribution claims to enhance their impact.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying and improving logical consistency is central to strengthening the argument chain in the artifact.
rationale.R1.5: Reorganizing the section-level structure and narrative arc is central to making the overall presentation stronger.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is load-bearing for making the writing stronger.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is centrally expected to ensure balanced strengthening of claims without misleading readers.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration when making the arguments and findings stronger.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the original scope is central to focused improvements without expanding beyond the artifact's intent.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harm is centrally considered to ensure revisions do not promote misuse of AI evaluation insights.
rationale.RX.5: Maintaining provenance and traceability is central for tracking changes made to strengthen the artifact.
